column1: ___________you apologize, or I’ll never speak to you again.
Do you want it ready for Thursday or Friday? - _______ day is fine for me.
I don’t think he is going to invite _________ of us.
__________ of my friends came to class today.
___________of their parents understood what the baby was trying to say.
_________of our cars has enough petrol, so we have to take the bus.
Would you like your sandwich with cheese or chicken? - __________. I’m on a diet.
I’m sorry, but I’ve lost _________ of your books.
_________ of them has the same opinion.
